chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2595 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «كُلُّ ثَوْبٍ تُصَلِّي فِيهِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ تُحْرِمَ فِيهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2595 - Hamad narrated from Hariz, from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"There is no harm in wearing any garment while praying."
